title: Example Texture Pack
description: An example texture pack for 1.21.4-26.1.x, with custom model items, emojis, and more!
body:
An example texture pack for 1.21.4-1.21.11, to create custom model textures and emojis.

Contains 4 custom model textures and 4 emojis. There are multiple "help" text files which will help you understand how the pack works. Detailed steps on how to obtain the textures and emojis ingame is also made available.

Available Textures:

![Textures Included](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7eb49dd6ab260132f8e4e50baddc1b8b07bd853f.png)

Available Emojis:

![Emojis Included](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65e5121b71486071a7e1182eee772d2953080afa.png)
